name: iivo-glass
description: IIVO Glass — transparent desktop AI overlay companion for IIVO.
author: Christopher Miles / IIVO

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/test/config.test.ts src/test/contextPayload.test.ts src/test/noteExtraction.test.ts src/test/savedMoments.test.ts src/test/privacyState.test.ts src/test/sessionStore.test.ts src/test/sessionIntelligence.test.ts src/test/sessionSummary.test.ts src/test/sessionPayload.test.ts src/test/sessionScreenshotPaths.test.ts src/test/transcriptionTypes.test.ts src/test/windowContext.test.ts src/test/iivoAnalysisClient.test.ts
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
